narrative_beat: Medium mercadores medievais chorando de joelhos sobre fardos em chamas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: medieval merchants in rich robes weeping on their knees over burning bales of silk, spices, and gold, in a harbor marketplace engulfed in flames, painted in hyperdetailed Renaissance style
subject.focal_point: a burning parchment scroll at center displaying the Bible verse text
subject.secondary: Harbor buildings and ships in monochrome behind. Flames consuming everything.
props: weeping medieval merchants in rich robes
burning bales of silk and spices

composition.foreground: merchants and burning goods in vivid crimson, ochre and gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white harbor city and ships

lighting.key_light: fire glow from burning goods as primary light

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: lamentation, commercial apocalypse, ruin of the rich

symbolism.primary: Revelation 18:11 — merchants weeping because no one buys their goods
symbolism.secondary: fire as divine judgement on commerce

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.content: E sobre ela choram e lamentam os mercadores da terra; porque ninguem compra mais as suas mercadorias.
in_scene_text.font_style: ancient gothic calligraphy in aged gold ink
in_scene_text.medium: inscribed on burning aged parchment scroll
in_scene_text.placement: center of frame on the scroll

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: The text in quotes MUST be rendered exactly as written, letter by letter, in the specified font style. This is a Bible verse and accuracy is sacred.
